title: Associate Software Engineer
description:
**Why it’s worth it:**

Pursuing a career at ReliaQuest will allow you to write code and manipulate data in ways that have never been done before, driving automation of threat detection and response for one of the world’s fastest growing industries. You will lead the creation, testing, and deployment of cutting\\-edge security technology to enterprise customers across the globe. Above all else, this role will allow you to work and learn from some of the most talented people in the business as well as have a direct contribution to the growth and success of RQ.
   

  

**The everyday hustle:**
* Research and develop creative solutions across a wide range of cutting\\-edge technologies to continuously evolve our platform, GreyMatter.
* Create REST API’s and integrations between various products to improve and automate our customer’s threat detection.
* Manage the continuous integration and deployment processes of complex technologies.
* Perform code reviews to ensure consistent improvement.
* Proactively automate and improve all stages of the software development lifecycle.
* Interface closely with various parts of the business, both internally and externally, to ensure all users are leveraging the product with ease and to its full potential.
* Provide support to other team members as well as cultivate a culture of constant collaboration.


**Do you have what it takes?**
* 0\\-1 Years of Software Development experience in the following: Java, Spring Boot, and developing in a microservices architecture.


**What makes you uncommon?**
* Hands on experience with one or more of the following technologies (Elasticsearch, Kafka, Apache Spark, Logstash, Hadoop/hive, Tensorflow, Kibana, Athena/Presto/BigTable, Angular, React).
* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.

* Experience with Agile Methodology.
* Higher education/relevant certifications.

title: Sr. Staff Software Engineer, Systems Infrastructure
description:
LinkedIn is the worlds largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. Were also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture thats built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun where everyone can succeed.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 This role will be based in Bangalore, India. At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team.
   

  





 As part of our world\\-class software engineering team, you will be charged with building the next\\-generation infrastructure and platforms for LinkedIn, including but not limited to: an application and service delivery platform, massively scalable data storage and replication systems, cutting\\-edge search platform, best\\-in\\-class AI platform, experimentation platform, privacy and compliance platform etc. You will work and learn among the best, putting to use your passion for distributed technologies and algorithms, API design and systems\\-design, and your passion for writing code that performs at an extreme scale. LinkedIn has already pioneered well\\-known open\\-source infrastructure projects like Apache Kafka, Pinot, Azkaban, Samza, Venice, Datahub, Feather, etc. We also work with industry standard open source infrastructure products like Kubernetes, GRPC and GraphQL \\- come join our infrastructure teams and share the knowledge with a broader community while making a real impact within our company.
   

  





 Responsibilities
   

  




* Deliver impact by driving innovation while building and shipping software at scale
* Provide architectural guidance and mentorship to up\\-level the engineering organization
* Actively improve the level of craftsmanship at LinkedIn by developing best practices and defining best strategies
* Design products/services/tools and code that can be used by others while upholding operational impact of all decisions
* Identify problems and opportunities and lead teams to architect, design, implement and operationalize systems
* Work closely with and influence product and/or technology partners regularly to help define roadmap
* Resolve conflicts between teams within the organization to get alignment and build team culture
* Review others' work and share knowledge


**Qualifications**

 Basic Qualifications
   

  




* BA/BS Degree in Computer Science or related technical discipline, or equivalent practical experience
* 14\\+ years of industry experience in software design, development, and algorithm related solutions.
* 14\\+ years of experience programming in object\\-oriented languages such as Java, C\\+\\+, Python, Go, C\\# and/or Functional languages such as Scala or other relevant coding languages
* Hands on experience developing distributed systems, large\\-scale systems, databases and/or Backend APIs
* 14\\+ years experience in software design, development, and algorithm related solutions with at least 5 years of experience in a technical leadership position
* 5\\+ years of experience in an architect or technical leadership position



 Preferred Qualifications
   

  




* 5\\+ years experience with large\\-scale distributed systems and client\\-server architectures
* Experience leading a large organization
* Experience leading by influence, formulating and driving technical strategies across various organizations



 Suggested Skills
   

  




* Distributed systems
* Backend Systems Infrastructure
* Java



 You will Benefit from our Culture
   

  





 We strongly believe in the well\\-being of our employees and their families. That is why we offer generous health and wellness programs and time away for employees of all levels

title: Software Engineer I
description:

We have been at the forefront of financial innovation for over four decades, known for our cutting\\-edge technology and client commitment.

Our advanced technology, competitive pricing, and global market help our clients to make the most of their investments.

**Thrive at BlackLine Because You Are Joining:**
* A technology\\-based company with a sense of adventure and a vision for the future. Every door at BlackLine is open. Just bring your brains, your problem\\-solving skills, and be part of a winning team at the world's most trusted name in Finance Automation!
* A culture that is kind, open, and accepting. It's a place where people can embrace what makes them unique, and the mix of cultural backgrounds and varying interests cultivates diverse thought and perspectives.

description:
**About AiDASH**
 AiDASH is leading the PreventionFirst™movement for electric utilities and transforming grid resilience through its pioneering platform that unifies vegetation, asset, storm, and wildfire intelligence. Powered by SatelliteFirst™ Inspection \\& Monitoring, AiDASH delivers comprehensive visibility across the entire grid at the right frequency and budget, using the right data modality. More than 200 customers trust AiDASH to keep the lights on, spend where it counts, and defend every decision, Securing Tomorrow across every mile of the grid. Learn more at www.aidash.com.
   

  

 We are a Series C growth company backed by leading investors, including Shell Ventures, National Grid Partners, G2 Venture Partners, Duke Energy, Edison International, Lightrock, Marubeni, among others. We have been recognized by Forbes two years in a row as one of "America's Best Startup Employers." We are also proud to be one of the few software companies in Time Magazine's "America's Top GreenTech Companies 2024". Deloitte Technology Fast 500™ recently ranked us at No. 12 among San Francisco Bay Area companies, and No. 59 overall in their selection of the top 500 for 2024\\.
   

  

 Join us in Securing Tomorrow!
   

  

**The Role**
 Our Field Services Application Engineering team is where the AiDASH platform meets the real\\-world needs of enterprise customers. We take the core product and tailor it to each customer's workflows, systems, and data – building extensions on top of core product APIs, integrations with customer and partner systems, and bespoke capabilities that large utilities (especially Investor\\-Owned Utilities) depend on. It is hands\\-on, customer\\-facing engineering with direct, measurable impact.
   

  

 As a software engineer III, you will bring deep full\\-stack expertise and a strong sense of ownership to high\\-impact, customer\\-facing work. With a roster of integrations on the near\\-term horizon, you will lead the design and delivery of complex solutions that bridge the gap between our core product and the specific demands of the market, mentor other engineers, and act as a technical authority within the team. You will work closely with customers and partners to translate ambiguous requirements into production\\-grade software.
   

  

**How You'll Make an Impact**
* Lead complex customer solutions: Architect and deliver sophisticated integrations, migrations, and platform extensions — built on core product APIs — that address unique enterprise workflows, owning the work from technical scoping through production deployment.
* Bridge product and market: Close the gap between the core platform and the bespoke requirements of large customers, especially Investor\\-Owned Utilities, balancing reusable, product\\-aligned design against customer\\-specific needs.
* Partner with customers directly: Engage customers and external partners on upcoming integrations — scoping requirements, presenting trade\\-offs, and building trust as the technical face of AiDASH.
* Drive full\\-stack excellence: Work authoritatively across the stack — backend (Python, Java) and frontend (React with TypeScript) — making sound architectural decisions that balance speed, scalability, and maintainability.
* Build AI\\-native: Use AI tooling — from AI\\-assisted coding such as Cursor and Claude to agentic workflows and services like AWS Bedrock — to ship faster and raise quality, and help establish how the team works with these tools.
* Own technical architecture: Lead schema design, data modelling, and query optimisation across SQL and NoSQL databases for complex, high\\-volume customer environments.
* Set the engineering bar: Champion best practices in code quality, testing, documentation, and system design; conduct thorough code reviews and mentor junior engineers.
* Communicate with clarity: Present technical decisions and trade\\-offs clearly to both engineering and non\\-technical stakeholders at all levels, working in an Agile/Scrum environment with JIRA.


**What We're Looking For**
* 6\\+ years of professional experience delivering full\\-stack web applications in production.
* Deep expertise in Python or Java for backend development, and React with TypeScript on the frontend.
* Strong command of SQL and NoSQL databases — including schema design, query optimisation, and data pipeline architecture.
* Proven ability to architect and deliver scalable, maintainable, well\\-tested systems end to end.
* Experience building API\\-based extensions and integrating with third\\-party or partner systems.
* Fluency with AI\\-assisted development — AI coding assistants (e.g., Cursor, Claude) and/or agentic workflows and services such as AWS Bedrock — and good judgement about where they add value.
* Experience in B2B SaaS or enterprise software, ideally with customer\\-facing or professional services exposure; comfort working directly with customers and partners.
* Comfortable in an Agile/Scrum environment using JIRA.
* A degree in computer science or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.


**Nice to Have**
* Experience working with utilities, energy, or other regulated enterprise customers (Investor\\-Owned Utilities a strong plus).
* Background in a professional services, solutions, or field engineering team within a product company.
* Exposure to geospatial, satellite, or large\\-scale data products.


 We are committed to providing an inclusive and accessible interview experience for all candidates. Please let us know if you require any accommodation during the interview process, and we will make every effort to meet your needs.

title: Principal Architect
description:
About Alegeus
 



 Alegeus powers the most configurable platform in consumer\\-directed healthcare benefits, serving employers, TPAs, and health plans that collectively deliver HSA, FSA, HRA, commuter, lifestyle, and emerging account\\-based benefits to tens of millions of Americans. Our partners depend on Alegeus for accuracy, uptime, and a consumer experience that performs flawlessly during the highest\\-stakes moments of someone’s financial and medical life.
 



 The Opportunity
 



 We are hiring a Principal Architect to lead application architecture across our Participant Portal, Integration Manager, and Alegeus Design System from India. This is a foundational hire with full executive support and a clear mandate: modernize our customer\\-facing application platforms, establish a token\\-first multi\\-framework design system, and build a permanent senior engineering bench in India. You will partner with US\\-based architecture and product leadership on global technical strategy. The ideal candidate also brings meaningful data architecture depth that will expand into broader data stewardship as the role matures.
 



 What You Will Own
 



***Application Architecture***



* Lead architectural direction for the Participant Portal modernization on React and TypeScript—performance, accessibility (WCAG 2\\.1 AA), security, and observability architected in from the start.
* Set architectural direction for Integration Manager as it scales to handle greater integration complexity across benefits administrators, health plans, and employer partners.
* Shape API and integration patterns (REST, GraphQL, event\\-driven, BFF and gateway design) serving internal apps, external partners, and enterprise integrations—with HIPAA\\-grade application security architected throughout.



***Design System Architecture***



* Own architectural direction for the Alegeus Design System, evolving it from Angular\\-based Web Components toward a token\\-first, multi\\-framework system that serves React (Participant Portal), Vue \\+ Angular (Employer Portal), and future consumers cleanly.
* Establish the design token platform (W3C DTCG specification, Style Dictionary pipelines, multi\\-format output) and the design\\-tool integration strategy (Figma Variables, Tokens Studio, Dev Mode, and/or UXPin Merge).
* Establish design system governance (RFC process, component lifecycle, versioning, contribution model) and quality infrastructure (Storybook, visual regression, accessibility automation, component testing).
* Partner with our Design Lead on design\\-engineering workflow, component API design, and prototype\\-to\\-production handoff.



***Data Architecture Stewardship (Expanding Over Time)***



* Serve as architectural voice for data concerns that touch application systems—analytics, reporting, pipelines that feed product features and benefits administrators \\- partnering with data engineering on architecture at the application\\-data boundary, including PHI/PII handling and HIPAA\\-grade compliance.
* Grow into more direct architectural leadership on data platforms as credibility is established and as Alegeus’s data architecture function matures.



***Team Building \\& Leadership***



* Build and mentor application engineering teams in India. Develop the bench: senior engineers, tech leads, next\\-generation architects.
* Establish engineering practices, architecture review cadences, and code standards that scale. Represent India application engineering in leadership conversations with US architecture and product leadership.



 How Success Will Be Measured
 



 You will be measured on a mix of architectural delivery, platform maturity, and organizational outcomes, including:
 


* Participant Portal modernization milestones delivered on committed timelines.
* Design system maturity: token platform operational, multi\\-framework support, governance model in force, Storybook\\-to\\-Figma/UXPin integration working.
* Permanent India application engineering hires made and retained; reduced staff augmentation dependency.
* Architecture review cadence established and cross\\-portfolio consistency adopted.
* Expansion into data architecture stewardship on an agreed timeline, with clean boundaries to AI platform architecture.



 What You Bring
 


* **Leadership tenure.** 
 12–16 years of software engineering experience, with 4\\+ years in principal engineer or architect roles at enterprise scale. Track record of building and mentoring application engineering teams in India and navigating US\\-India distributed collaboration.
* **Customer\\-facing application depth.** 
 You have led modernization of large customer\\-facing application platforms—not only internal tools or greenfield projects. Deep expertise in React, TypeScript, modern frontend architecture, component systems, and performance at scale. Working knowledge of Angular and Vue a plus.
* **Design system architecture—hands\\-on.** 
 Proven experience architecting or significantly contributing to a production design system consumed by multiple product teams. Practical expertise with design tokens (W3C DTCG), Style Dictionary pipelines, component API design, Storybook, design tool integration (Figma and/or UXPin Merge), and design system governance. This is a hard requirement for the role.
* **Accessibility practice.** 
 Hands\\-on accessibility discipline beyond automated tooling—keyboard and screen reader testing, ARIA pattern expertise, WCAG 2\\.1 AA compliance architected rather than bolted on.
* **Data architecture exposure.** 
 Meaningful architectural experience with data platforms, pipelines, or analytics infrastructure in at least one prior role. Working knowledge of modern data warehouses, streaming, orchestration, and cloud data services. Full data architect depth a strong plus but not required.
* **Regulated\\-industry experience.** 
 Healthcare, fintech, or insurance—with working knowledge of HIPAA, SOC 2, or related compliance frameworks—strongly preferred given our domain.
* **Leadership presence.** 
 Strong written and verbal communication; ability to explain architectural trade\\-offs to product, design, and executive stakeholders. Influence through credibility rather than authority. Hands\\-on willingness—reads code, participates in deep\\-dives, stays close to the work.
* **Education.** 
 Bachelor’s in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience. Advanced degree a plus.



 Nice to Have
 


* Experience with benefits administration, HSA/FSA/HRA platforms, payments, or similar multi\\-tenant healthcare or financial SaaS.
* Design system work published publicly or contributed to open\\-source component libraries, token specifications, or design system tooling.
* Experience in architecture roles spanning both application and data domains at principal level.
* Familiarity with Web Components, Angular Elements, or other framework\\-agnostic component architectures.
